title: NIS2 Management Body Cybersecurity Training Evidence

compliance.assurance_rationale: Uplifted from contributing: SPL directly addresses Art.20 requirements with specific, actionable monitoring.
compliance.controlObjective: Evidence that NIS2 Art.20 (Governance) is enforced ‚Äî Splunk UC-22.2.41: NIS2 Management Body Cybersecurity Training Evidence.
compliance.evidenceArtifact: Saved search 'UC-22.2.41' running on index=training (role=executive|board, course_code, completion_date), nis2_management_roster.csv, archived to the restricted audit_evidence index (default 7-year retention). Auto-drafted ‚Äî SME review required.

dataSources: `index=training` with `sourcetype=lms:completion` (LMS module completions keyed to `person_id`, `course_code`, `course_name`, `completion_date`, `score`, `role`, `department`). Authoritative membership and appointment metadata live in the CSV lookup `nis2_management_roster.csv` (`person_id`, `name`, `role`, `board_member`, `appointment_date`, `last_training_date`). Typical collectors: Splunk HTTP Event Collector (`inputs.conf` Global Settings) or the Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Office 365 ([Splunkbase 4055](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/4055)) when the LMS is Entra ID‚Äìconnected.
app: Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Office 365 ([Splunkbase 4055](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/4055)) or native HTTP Event Collector (`http://`/`https://` token endpoint) for `lms:completion` events destined for `index=training`.
spl:
| inputlookup nis2_management_roster.csv
| eval roster_person=person_id
| join type=left roster_person [
    search index=training sourcetype=lms:completion (course_code="NIS2_EXEC" OR course_code="CYBER-BOARD-101") earliest=-730d
    | stats latest(completion_date) as last_completion latest(score) as last_score by person_id
    | rename person_id as roster_person
]
| eval last_completion_epoch=if(isnotnull(last_completion), strptime(last_completion,"%Y-%m-%d"), null())
| eval days_since=if(isnotnull(last_completion_epoch), round((now()-last_completion_epoch)/86400,0), null())
| eval gap_reason=case(isnull(last_completion),"missing_course",days_since>365,"stale_over_365d",true(),null())
| where isnotnull(gap_reason)
| eval evidence_id=md5(roster_person . "|NIS2_MGMT_TRAIN|" . if(isnotnull(last_completion), last_completion, "none"))
| table person_id, name, role, board_member, last_completion, last_score, days_since, gap_reason, evidence_id
description: Correlates the official management-body roster against `lms:completion` rows in `index=training` and surfaces people who never completed the mandated NIS2 governance curriculum or whose `completion_date` is more than 365 days old.
value: Produces repeatable training-gap evidence for board and supervisory conversations without manually reconciling spreadsheets each quarter, so legal and people teams can intervene before governance reviews or competent-authority questions materialise.
implementation: (1) Keep `nis2_management_roster.csv` aligned with corporate registry filings and `board_member` flags. (2) Publish stable `course_code` values from the LMS for NIS2 leadership modules. (3) Grant search-only RBAC (`srchIndexesAllowed` includes `training`) to HR compliance analysts; restrict roster lookup updates to `lookup_editor` service accounts. (4) Route alert output to the `audit_evidence` index or GRC tooling. (5) Pair with UC-22.2.20 for governance dashboards.
visualization: Table of roster rows with `gap_reason`, `days_since`, and `evidence_id`; single value for count of `stale_over_365d`; bar chart by `role`; timeline of `last_completion` per `person_id`.

references.title: Splunk Docs ‚Äî Configure HTTP Event Collector

knownFalsePositives:
‚Ä¢ **Azure AD provisioning lag after a board election** ‚Äî Distinguish: Entra ID shows the new director but `person_id` in `nis2_management_roster.csv` still points to the predecessor. Suppress: time-bound exception row in `nis2_training_exceptions.csv` with `exception_until` covering the HR cut-over window.
‚Ä¢ **Cornerstone OnDemand CSV replay duplicates completions** ‚Äî Distinguish: identical `completion_date` with different `_cd` or source host indicates a collector resend. Suppress: filter the SPL subsearch with `| dedup person_id completion_date` before `stats latest()`.
‚Ä¢ **Executive completes an alternate module with a different `course_code`** ‚Äî Distinguish: HR confirms equivalent curriculum; events exist under `course_name` but not `NIS2_EXEC`. Suppress: extend the roster-driven `allowed_course_codes` column and `lookup` it to widen the subsearch `where` clause.
‚Ä¢ **Sabbatical or medical leave documented only in Workday** ‚Äî Distinguish: `department` still lists the person active but `board_member=yes` with leave paperwork. Suppress: exception register entry keyed on `person_id` referencing the leave ticket until return date.
‚Ä¢ **Clock skew between LMS and Splunk makes `completion_date` appear future-dated** ‚Äî Distinguish: `strptime` yields null or negative `days_since`. Suppress: add `where completion_date<=strftime(now(),"%Y-%m-%d")` after ingestion normalization in `props.conf`.
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
‚Ä¢ Splunk Enterprise or Splunk Cloud 9.x search head with RBAC role granting `srchIndexesAllowed=training` plus read access to `nis2_management_roster.csv` under `$SPLUNK_HOME/etc/apps/search/lookups/` (or equivalent KV store collection).
‚Ä¢ Ingest path A: HTTP Event Collector token configured under **Settings ‚Üí Data inputs ‚Üí HTTP Event Collector**, writing JSON lines with `sourcetype=lms:completion` into `index=training`. Ingest path B: Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Office 365 ([Splunkbase 4055](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/4055)) if the LMS SSO trusts Entra ID and you already centralise Azure AD sign-in risk there ‚Äî still map LMS completion webhooks into `lms:completion` via a heavy forwarder.
‚Ä¢ LMS export or API must populate `person_id`, `course_code`, `course_name`, `completion_date`, `score`, `role`, and `department` before events hit `_indextime`; HR validates `nis2_management_roster` columns weekly.
‚Ä¢ Baseline expectation: each board or executive member completes `NIS2_EXEC` or `CYBER-BOARD-101` at least annually ‚Äî the SPL uses a **730-day** lookback window to catch long leaves without truncating past proof.

Step 1 ‚Äî Configure data collection
Create `props.conf` (app context, e.g. `training_lms/local/props.conf`) for `lms:completion` with `TIME_PREFIX`/`TIME_FORMAT` aligned to `completion_date`, and add `FIELDALIAS-` stanzas if the LMS emits a different employee key than `person_id`. For HEC, set `indexes=training` on the token stanza in `inputs.conf` Global Settings.

Deployment checklist: (1) Verify `btool` merge ‚Äî `splunk btool props list lms:completion --debug`. (2) Confirm **30-day** retention on `index=training` meets your policy; extend if HR needs historical proof. (3) Document the mapping from Workday/HCM IDs to `person_id` to avoid orphan joins.

Step 2 ‚Äî Create the search
Save as `UC-22.2.41 ‚Äî NIS2 management training gaps` (Settings ‚Üí Searches, reports, and alerts). Paste the SPL from the `spl` field, then schedule weekly with lookback `-730d` embedded in the subsearch.

Understanding this SPL: `inputlookup` loads every in-scope leader. `join type=left` preserves roster rows even when no LMS event exists (the gap you must prove). `stats latest(completion_date)` collapses replays. `gap_reason` labels either a missing course or a completion older than 365 days, and `evidence_id` holds a stable hash for export bundles.

Optional alert action: webhook to ServiceNow GRC with `evidence_id` in the payload.

Step 3 ‚Äî Validate
‚Ä¢ Run against a known trained chair: the row must disappear unless you force `days_since>365` in a dev index. ‚Ä¢ Compare counts to the LMS **Completion report** UI for the same fiscal week ‚Äî variance should be zero. ‚Ä¢ Spot-check `person_id` joins: `| inputlookup nis2_management_roster.csv | stats dc(person_id)` must equal HR‚Äôs headcount file. ‚Ä¢ permissions test: log in as `hr_compliance_reader` and confirm `rest /services/authentication/users/` shows only the delegated role ‚Äî no `admin`.

Step 4 ‚Äî Operationalize
Dashboard row 1: single value `open_gaps`. Row 2: drillable table sorted by `board_member desc`. Row 3: trend of `missing_course` counts after each AGM. Attach runbook link describing how Legal uses the export. Archive weekly CSV snapshots to immutable storage and record SHA-256 beside each `evidence_id`.

Step 5 ‚Äî Troubleshooting
‚Ä¢ **Empty main search after upgrade** ‚Äî Confirm token still lists `index=training` in **Settings ‚Üí Tokens** and forwarders were not switched to a dev index; rerun `index=training sourcetype=lms:completion | head 5`.
‚Ä¢ **All executives suddenly stale** ‚Äî LMS changed `course_code`; update the `where` clause in the subsearch and publish change record.
‚Ä¢ **Join drops non-matching keys** ‚Äî Remove accidental inner join; ensure `rename` after `stats` keeps `roster_person` aligned.
‚Ä¢ **Performance timeouts** ‚Äî Narrow earliest to **365d** in the subsearch if indexers struggle, but document the shorter evidence window to auditors.
‚Ä¢ **PII exposure** ‚Äî Strip `name` from email templates; send only `person_id` externally and resolve names inside Splunk.
grandmaExplanation: We check an official list of leaders against training records so we can see who still needs the yearly cyber lesson the law expects directors to take, before anyone important is left uncovered.
exclusions: Does not store certificates or exam answers, does not certify legal applicability of NIS2 to your entity, and does not replace qualified legal review of board duties or national transposition measures.
evidence: Scheduled saved search `UC-22.2.41`, exported CSV of gap rows with `evidence_id`, dashboard panel screenshot, and optionally RFC 3161 timestamp token metadata archived alongside the weekly run.

controlTest.positiveScenario: Fixture rows: `nis2_management_roster.csv` lists person_id exec-900 with board_member=Y and course alignment NIS2_EXEC; subsearch finds no lms:completion event ‚Äî the alert returns gap_reason=missing_course and a non-null evidence_id.
controlTest.negativeScenario: Synthetic negative path: ingest two `lms:completion` events for person_id exec-900 with course_code=NIS2_EXEC, completion_date equal to the Friday twelve weeks before the test run, and score=94; keep appointment_date on the roster stable ‚Äî the left-join brings last_completion forward, days_since stays at 84, gap_reason stays null, and the saved search result set is intentionally empty which is what we want for a clean annual attestation pack.
